metadata.regulatory_mandate: Factories Act Section 88 / OISD standards evidence preservation
metadata.description: Sealed SCADA telemetry and risk factors recording for safety investigation.

factors.name: CO Toxicity Risk
factors.details: TOXIC GAS ALARM: Carbon Monoxide level is 28.0 ppm (OSHA PEL: 50 ppm, OISD-137 limits exceeded).

factors.name: Hot Work Flammable Gas Overlap
factors.details: CRITICAL: Active Hot Work (ignition source) in area with 4.2% LFL Methane. High risk of immediate fire/explosion. Violation of OISD-STD-105 Work Permit standards.

factors.name: Memory: Monday Morning Restart Risk
factors.details: Historical plant memory shows increased operator slip incidents during Monday morning startup cycles.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.
